techniques.technique: Match Legitimate Resource Name or Location
Match Legitimate Resource Name or Location

payload.message: This is an automatically generated message from Tines

agents.name: Relevant Techniques for SOAR Evaluation per ATTCK Technique

payload.d3fend_techniques:
=FILTER(
  identify_related_d3fend_techniques.related_d3fend_techniques,
  LAMBDA(technique, INCLUDES(['Detect','Evict','Restore'],technique.def_tactic_label.value)))
|> MAP_LAMBDA(
  %,
  LAMBDA(
    selection, OBJECT(
      "def_tactic", selection.def_tactic_label.value,
      "def_technique",selection.def_tech_label.value)
  )
)|> UNIQ(%)

options.payload:
=FILTER(
  implode_mapped_techniques,
  LAMBDA(
    technique,
    MAP(technique.d3fend_techniques, "def_tactic")
    |> 
    AND(
      INCLUDES(%, "Detect"),
      INCLUDES(%, "Evict")
      )
  )
)
